title: Datadog agent installed on weaverandbook-web
text: Datadog agent v7 installed and configured on weaverandbook-web (Nginx + Webflow proxy). Monitoring active.

title: SSL certificate renewed - weaverandbook.se
text: SSL certificate for weaverandbook.se renewed via Cloudflare. Valid for 365 days. New expiry 2027-02-01.

title: Cloudflare DNS config updated - weaverandbook.se
text: DNS A record for weaverandbook.se updated to new web server IP. TTL set to 300s. Propagation confirmed.

title: Email forwarding test - orders@weaverandbook.se
text: Test email sent through orders@weaverandbook.se forwarding chain. Delivery confirmed to lucia.weaver@Finthesiss.ai within 12s.

title: WordPress legacy site - maintenance mode enabled
text: WordPress site at weaverandbook.se (legacy) placed in maintenance mode ahead of Webflow migration. Segment source wordpress-legacy disabled.

title: Webflow preview site deployed - weaverandbook-dev
text: First Webflow preview build deployed to preview.weaverandbook.se on weaverandbook-dev. Homepage and books listing live for review.

title: Monitor 2006 - Books page load time WARN
text: Books page (weaverandbook.se/books) response time exceeded 3s threshold (measured 3.2s). Investigating Webflow CDN edge latency.

title: Monitor 2006 - Books page load time RECOVERED
text: Books page load time returned below 3s threshold (currently 0.72s). Cloudflare cache rules updated. Issue resolved.

title: Segment source webflow-site enabled
text: Segment JavaScript source (src_webflow01) activated on Webflow preview site. GA4 and Amplitude destinations confirmed receiving events.

title: Webflow preview deploy - books detail pages + staff picks
text: Second Webflow preview build deployed. Book detail pages (/books/:slug) and staff picks section now live on preview.weaverandbook.se.

title: DNS MX record check - weaverandbook.se
text: Scheduled DNS MX record verification for weaverandbook.se. Records pointing to mail.weaverandbook.se confirmed correct.

title: Sentry projects created - weaverandbook-frontend and weaverandbook-checkout
text: Sentry error monitoring projects created for new Webflow frontend and Stripe checkout integration. DSN keys configured in Webflow embeds.

title: PostHog self-hosted evaluation - first events received
text: PostHog self-hosted instance received first events from Webflow preview site. Feature flags configured for new-checkout-layout and newsletter-popup.

title: Webflow preview deploy - events section + RSVP flow
text: Third Webflow preview build. Events listing (/events), event detail pages, and RSVP form deployed to preview.weaverandbook.se.

title: Monitor 2017 - Mail auth failure spike ALERT
text: 10+ authentication failures detected on weaverandbook-mail Postfix within 5 minutes. Source IP blocked via Cloudflare firewall rule.

title: Monitor 2017 - Mail auth failure spike RECOVERED
text: Authentication failure rate on weaverandbook-mail returned to normal. Cloudflare firewall rule active. No further brute-force attempts detected.

title: Stripe checkout integration - pre-launch webhook test
text: Stripe webhook endpoint configured on Webflow dev site. Test webhook (payment_intent.created) received and acknowledged within 320ms.

title: Webflow preview deploy - newsletter + checkout pages
text: Fourth Webflow preview build. Newsletter signup (/newsletter) and Stripe checkout flow deployed. Sentry weaverandbook-checkout DSN confirmed active.

title: Monitor 2021 - 404 surge on /books/ path WARN
text: Surge of 404 errors detected under /books/ path - 27 in 10 minutes. Likely broken links from staff-picks internal links after slug rename.

title: Cloudflare page rules updated - /books/ redirect rules
text: Cloudflare redirect rules updated to handle legacy WordPress /books/ slugs. 404 rate on /books/ path returned to baseline.

title: Webflow preview deploy - author pages + search
text: Fifth Webflow preview build. Author pages (/authors/:slug) and search-as-you-type feature deployed. Feature flag search-as-you-type set to 50% rollout.

title: Datadog Synthetics - monthly uptime SLA confirmed 99.9%+
text: Monthly uptime SLA check passed. weaverandbook.se achieved 99.91% uptime for November 2025. No SLA breach. Monitor 2020 OK.
